markdown:
The Transformer paper ("Attention Is All You Need", §5.3) sets the optimizer hyperparameters to **β₁ = 0.9, β₂ = 0.98, ε = 10⁻⁹**. So **β₂ = 0.98**. [1]

Sources
[1] Attention Is All You Need, 4 Why Self-Attention, p. 7
summary:
The Transformer paper ("Attention Is All You Need", §5.3) sets the optimizer hyperparameters to **β₁ = 0.9, β₂ = 0.98, ε = 10⁻⁹**. So **β₂ = 0.98**. [1]

Sources
